problem_title: Onboarding slows with disconnected provider outputs
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and manual inefficiencies when corporate onboarding checks remain siloed across multiple providers. This fragmented approach weakens audit readiness and complicates risk-based approval and review decisions for digital asset businesses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes KYC, KYB and screening outputs into a unified approval workflow that routes reviews, captures decisions and preserves audit evidence for corporate onboarding teams at VASPs.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to approval decisions
workflow_description: SFTY structures corporate onboarding checks through risk-based routing, manual reviews, case creation and decision logging to produce auditable approval outcomes.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for corporate onboarding?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects KYC, KYB, sanctions and UBO checks into a connected onboarding workflow tailored for digital asset corporate clients and VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage corporate approval workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes onboarding checks, applies internal risk rules, supports manual reviews, approvals or holds, and records all actions in an auditable corporate compliance workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, audit trails, documents and provider results to create a complete evidence package for onboarding review and regulatory inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC and KYB providers, orchestrating their outputs into structured workflows without replacing any individual provider.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers; it connects their results into controlled, explainable, and auditable onboarding processes.
final_title: Structure corporate onboarding into controlled approvals
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into structured workflows with preserved evidence and audit-ready onboarding cases.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
